## SOLID Principles Checklist

### Single Responsibility (SRP)
- [ ] Each class has exactly one reason to change
- [ ] No method name contains "And"
- [ ] No class imports 10+ packages
- [ ] No class exceeds 300 lines

### Open/Closed (OCP)
- [ ] No `switch`/`match` statements that dispatch on object type
- [ ] New behaviour is added by adding code, not editing existing code

### Liskov Substitution (LSP)
- [ ] No subclass throws `NotImplementedError` for inherited methods
- [ ] No `isinstance` or type checks used before calling methods
- [ ] Subclasses honour the contracts defined by base classes

### Interface Segregation (ISP)
- [ ] No interface has more than 5 methods
- [ ] No class implements interface methods with `pass` or stubs

### Dependency Inversion (DIP)
- [ ] No `ConcreteClass()` instantiated directly inside another class
- [ ] Dependencies injected via constructor with abstract types
